1.q: An autophagy-related gene Atg8 was cloned for the first time from wild emmer wheat, named as TdAtg8, and its role on autophagy under abiotic stress conditions was investigated.

2.q: Atg8-silenced plants exposed to osmotic stress were found to have decreased Atg8 expression level in comparison to controls. Hence, Atg8 is a positive regulator in osmotic and drought stress response.

3.q: a total of 64 m6A-related genes were found in wild emmer wheat, including 21 m6A writers (5 TdMTs, 2 TdFIP37s, 2 TdVIRs...)
